design_axes.wire_coder: FIRST-TICK = identity passthrough; SUBSEQUENT-TICK = ^Z<idx> greedy substitution + ^Z^ literal-escape

raw_137_design_classification: forward sweep + integer occurrence count + lexicographic tie-break + integer score + integer top-N selection. NO fp ops. NO neural mixer. NO non-deterministic similarity.

fixtures.note: saturated: every length-3..32 window in the small fixture corpus repeats across all 3 files (highly-structured JSONL); on heterogeneous production corpora the multi-file count will be lower (subsequent-tick LIVE FIRE measurement gate).

fixtures.name: round-trip byte-eq JSON 234 B
